Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) — 
Base with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D research files. The guide includes several ways for users to quickly find the 
information they need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order
